previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 7th of 12 at Sunshine Coast 3yo Mdn on March 29 over 1400m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Clive's Glory carrying 59.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up second last of 11 at Eagle Farm 3yo Mdn-Sw on January 7 over 1400m, 10 len behind Kohler Kid with 58kg at $3.50. Can improve sharply with the blinkers applied for the first time.
